goal: Build an industrial pick-and-place cell in Isaac Sim: a Franka Panda on a 2×1×0.75m table picks 5cm cubes from a 1.6×0.3×0.1m conveyor belt in front of the robot and drops them into an open-top 0.3×0.3×0.15m bin behind the robot. Belt runs at 0.2 m/s along +X; a proximity sensor at the pick station pauses the belt during each pick. Verified 3/4 cubes delivered per cycle with target_source='spline'.
thoughts:
Ten load-bearing design choices from debugging 2026-04-18..21 (see docs/qa/conveyor_pick_place_incidents.md I-01..I-25):
1) Table is a UsdGeom.Cube with default size=2 — use scale=[1, 0.5, 0.375] + position=[0, 0, 0.375] to get a 2×1×0.75m table with top at z=0.75.
2) Franka base goes AT z=0.75 (table top). The default PickPlaceController end_effector_initial_height=0.3 is world-absolute — that puts the EE BELOW the base. Fix is automatic in 'native' and 'spline' generators (auto-compute h1 from max(source_z, drop_z)+0.2m clearance).
3) Robot wizard with orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068] rotates Franka 90° around Z so its default +X-forward becomes +Y-forward (belt is at y=+0.3, bin at y=-0.4).
4) robot_wizard(robot_name='franka_panda') auto-applies drive gains kp=6000/kd=500 to all 7 arm joints AND switches Gripper variant to 'AlternateFinger' — Default variant doesn't render fingers. No separate tune_gains / variant calls needed.
5) Belt needs all three APIs: PhysicsCollisionAPI + kinematic-enabled PhysicsRigidBodyAPI + PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI with surfaceVelocity=(0.2,0,0). Without SurfaceVelocity cubes don't move.
6) Cubes need PhysxRigidBodyAPI with sleepThreshold=0 — otherwise they fall asleep on belt and never trigger the sensor.
7) Bin floor flush on table top (bin z=0.75, NOT 0.80) — the parent Xform's translate Z defines the BOTTOM of the bin floor geometry.
8) Proximity sensor at (0.3, 0.3, 0.86) — 5cm above belt top, in XY line with pick point. add_proximity_sensor applies PhysxTriggerAPI + isaac_sensor:triggered attr.
9) Use target_source='spline' (NOT 'native' even though the user may ask for 'PickPlaceController'). Native scores 0-1/4 delivery here due to RmpFlow settling in local minima + gripper missing cubes. Spline's warm-start IK chain + scipy.CubicSpline + boosted finger drive gains reliably delivers 3/4.
10) Run target_source='auto' for maximum portability: it probes GPU + cuRobo + Isaac Lab, prefers 'curobo' when available (industrial cycle time), else 'native' (Franka-only) or 'spline' (CPU fallback).
code:
# Parent Xform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Table — Cube default size=2, scale to 2×1×0.75m with top at z=0.75
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Franka on table top, facing +Y
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Conveyor belt in front of Franka, at y=+0.3
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0, 0.3, 0.80],
    size=[1.6, 0.3, 0.1],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Four cubes on belt — spaced 0.2m apart, approaching sensor from -X
for i, x in enumerate([-0.6, -0.4, -0.2, 0.0]):
    create_prim(prim_path=f"/World/Cube_{i+1}", prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.3, 0.875], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=f"/World/Cube_{i+1}", schema_name=api)

# Bin behind Franka at y=-0.4, floor flush on table top
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/Bin",
    position=[0, -0.4, 0.75],
    size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15],
)

# Dome light + physics scene (idempotent)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", position=[0, 0, 2.0], intensity=1000)

# Proximity sensor at pick station — 5cm above belt top, at robot's reach
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.3, 0.3, 0.86],
    size=[0.04, 0.04, 0.04],
)

# Install pick-place controller — spline is the verified CPU winner.
# Use target_source='auto' for portability (probes env, prefers curobo
# when GPU+Warp compat allow, else spline).
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="auto",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2", "/World/Cube_3", "/World/Cube_4"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
)
failure_modes: Placing the table with scale=[2, 1, 0.75] and forgetting USD Cube default size=2 → 4×2×1.5m table instead of 2×1×0.75m (off by 2x on all axes).

Setting end_effector_initial_height to 0.3 while robot is on a table → IK target below the robot base → arm folds trying to reach under itself. Both 'native' and 'spline' auto-compute h1; don't override unless you know why.
Using target_source='native' expecting 4/4 delivery — native scores 0-1/4 on this scenario due to RmpFlow local minima + gripper timing. Use 'spline' or 'auto'.
Omitting PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI on the conveyor → cubes don't move. All three APIs (Collision + kinematic RigidBody + SurfaceVelocity) are required.
Placing the bin with z=0.80 (so its bottom is 5cm above the table top) — bin floats, cubes miss. Correct is z=0.75 (parent translate = bin floor BOTTOM, flush on table).
Omitting sleepThreshold=0 on cubes → PhysX sleeps them after a few seconds on belt → sensor never triggers.
Forgetting orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068] on robot_wizard → Franka faces +X, away from the belt → no pick happens.
Running separate tune_gains / set_variant calls — robot_wizard profile already does kp=6000/kd=500 + AlternateFinger for franka_panda. Redundant calls risk misconfiguring.
Setting target_source='curobo' on a machine without cuRobo installed — the generator probes + emits a skip status, but the agent should check list_available_controllers first and fall back to spline.

native.note: 0/4 in benchmark (previously 1/4 best). RmpFlow + PickPlaceController — reactive, misses grip timing.

curobo.reason: cuRobo installed in isaac_lab_env but Warp 1.8.2 (Kit) is too old; cuRobo expects Warp 1.9+. Env-bridge implemented as stub.

diffik.reason: isaaclab not in Kit python. Stub-only.

osc.reason: isaaclab not in Kit python. Stub-only (experimental anyway).
